utlx-availableProcessors.description: Get number of available CPU cores/processors

utlx-default.description: Default value if undefined or null

utlx-envOrDefault.description: Get environment variable with default fallback

utlx-filter.description: Generic filter function that works on arrays, objects, and strings

utlx-isDebugMode.description: Check if running in debug mode

utlx-isNotEmpty.description: Checks if a value is not empty (inverse of isEmpty)

utlx-log.description: If no base is provided, uses natural logarithm (base e).

utlx-logPretty.description: Logs a pretty-printed representation of a value

utlx-logSize.description: Logs the size/length of a value

utlx-logType.description: Logs the type of a value

utlx-memoryInfo.description: Get JVM memory information in bytes

utlx-startTimer.description: Logs execution time of a block

utlx-systemPropertyOrDefault.description: Get system property with default fallback

utlx-analyzeString.description: Analyzes a string with a regex pattern and returns detailed match information.

utlx-camelize.description: Convert string to camelCase (Legacy naming - use camelCase)

utlx-charCodeAt.description: Get character code (Unicode code point) at index

utlx-endsWith.description: Check if string ends with suffix

utlx-findAllMatches.description: Finds all matches of a pattern and returns them with positions.

utlx-formatPlural.description: Creates a formatted string with count and correctly pluralized word

utlx-fromCamelCase.description: Convert from camelCase to separate words

utlx-fromConstantCase.description: Convert from CONSTANT_CASE to separate words

utlx-fromDotCase.description: Convert from dot.case to separate words

utlx-fromKebabCase.description: Convert from kebab-case to separate words

utlx-fromPascalCase.description: Convert from PascalCase to separate words

utlx-fromPathCase.description: Convert from path/case to separate words

utlx-fromSnakeCase.description: Convert from snake_case to separate words

utlx-fromTitleCase.description: Convert from Title Case to separate lowercase words

utlx-isAlpha.description: Alphabetic characters include A-Z, a-z, and Unicode letters.

utlx-isAlphanumeric.description: Combines isAlpha and isNumeric: characters must be A-Z, a-z, 0-9, or Unicode letters.

utlx-isAscii.description: ASCII includes standard English letters, digits, and punctuation.

utlx-isBlank.description: Check if string is blank (empty or only whitespace)

utlx-isLowerCase.description: Non-alphabetic characters (digits, spaces, etc.) are ignored.

utlx-isPlural.description: Checks if a word is in plural form

utlx-isPrintable.description: Printable characters include letters, digits, punctuation, and spaces.

utlx-isSingular.description: Checks if a word is in singular form

utlx-isUpperCase.description: Non-alphabetic characters (digits, spaces, etc.) are ignored.

utlx-isWhitespace.description: Whitespace includes spaces, tabs, newlines, and other Unicode whitespace.

utlx-join.description: Inner join - returns only items that have matches in both arrays

utlx-length.description: Get length of string or array

utlx-lower.description: Convert string to lowercase (Legacy naming - use lowerCase)

utlx-matchesWhole.description: Tests if a string matches a pattern completely (not just contains).

utlx-normalizeSpace.description: Normalize whitespace (collapse multiple spaces to single space)

utlx-pad.description: Pad string to length with character

utlx-padLeft.description: Pad string to length with character (Explicit left padding - pad() defaults to left)

utlx-pascalCase.description: Convert string to PascalCase (also called UpperCamelCase)

utlx-pluralize.description: Converts a singular noun to its plural form

utlx-regexGroups.description: Extracts all capture groups from the first match of a pattern.

utlx-regexNamedGroups.description: Extracts named capture groups from the first match.

utlx-replace.description: Replace occurrences in string. Supports single replacement or multiple replacements via object/array.

utlx-replaceWithFunction.description: Replaces all matches with results from a function.

utlx-singularize.description: Converts a plural noun to its singular form

utlx-splitWithMatches.description: Splits a string by a pattern, but keeps the matched parts.

utlx-startsWith.description: Check if string starts with prefix

utlx-toTitleCase.description: Convert string to title case (capitalize first letter of each word)

utlx-uncamelize.description: Convert from camelCase to separate words (Legacy naming - use fromCamelCase)

utlx-upper.description: Convert string to uppercase (Legacy naming - use upperCase)

utlx-wordCase.description: Convert string to word case (capitalize first letter, rest lowercase)

utlx-avg.description: Calculate the average (mean) of all numeric elements in an array

utlx-avgBy.description: Calculates the average value using a mapping function.

utlx-chunk.description: Chunks array into arrays of specified size

utlx-compact.description: Remove null, undefined, and empty values from array

utlx-count.description: Count the number of elements in an array

utlx-countBy.description: Counts the number of elements in an array that match a predicate.

utlx-crossJoin.description: Cross join - Cartesian product of both arrays

utlx-distinctBy.description: Similar to distinct(), but uses a key function to determine uniqueness.

utlx-every.description: Check if all elements match predicate

utlx-findIndex.description: Find the index of the first element matching predicate

utlx-findLastIndex.description: Find the index of the last element matching predicate

utlx-flatMap.description: Maps each element using function, then flattens result

utlx-flattenDeep.description: Deep flatten - flattens all nested levels

utlx-fullOuterJoin.description: Full outer join - returns all items from both arrays

utlx-groupBy.description: Groups array elements by a key function.

utlx-indexOf.description: Find index of value in array (simple equality)

utlx-insertAfter.description: Insert element after index in array

utlx-insertBefore.description: Insert element before index in array

utlx-lastIndexOf.description: Find last index of value in array

utlx-leftJoin.description: Left join - returns all items from left array, with matching items from right

utlx-max.description: Find the maximum value from an array or multiple arguments

utlx-maxBy.description: Finds the element with the maximum value according to a comparator function.

utlx-min.description: Find the minimum value from an array or multiple arguments

utlx-minBy.description: Finds the element with the minimum value according to a comparator function.

utlx-partition.description: Splits an array into two groups based on a predicate function.

utlx-remove.description: Remove element at index from array

utlx-rightJoin.description: Right join - returns all items from right array, with matching items from left

utlx-scan.description: Scan - like reduce but returns all intermediate results

utlx-slice.description: Slice array from start to end index

utlx-some.description: Check if any element matches predicate

utlx-sum.description: Calculate the sum of all numeric elements in an array

utlx-sumBy.description: Maps each element with a function and sums the results.

utlx-symmetricDifference.description: Symmetric difference - elements in either array but not both

utlx-transpose.description: Transpose a 2D array (swap rows and columns)

utlx-union.description: Combines two arrays and removes duplicates (set union: A ∪ B)

utlx-unzip.description: Unzip array of pairs into two arrays (inverse of zip)

utlx-unzipN.description: Unzip array of N-tuples into N arrays

utlx-windowed.description: Windowed - create sliding window over array

utlx-zipAll.description: ZipAll - zip arrays with padding for different lengths

utlx-atan2.description: coordinates (x, y) to polar coordinates (r, theta).

utlx-parseFloat.description: Parse float/decimal from string (alias for parseNumber)

utlx-addDays.description: Add days to a date or datetime

utlx-age.description: Calculate age in years from birthdate

utlx-currentDate.description: Get current date only (no time component)

utlx-currentTime.description: Get current time only (no date component)

utlx-dayOfMonth.description: Extract day component (Common alias for day-of-month extraction)

utlx-daysBetween.description: Calculate difference in days between two dates (DataWeave compatibility)

utlx-diffDays.description: Calculate difference in days between two dates

utlx-diffHours.description: Difference in hours between two dates

utlx-diffMinutes.description: Difference in minutes between two dates

utlx-diffMonths.description: Difference in months between two dates (approximate)

utlx-diffSeconds.description: Difference in seconds between two dates

utlx-diffWeeks.description: Difference in weeks between two dates

utlx-diffYears.description: Difference in years between two dates

utlx-formatDate.description: Format a date/time value with optional pattern and locale

utlx-fromUTC.description: Get local datetime from UTC in specified timezone

utlx-getTimezoneName.description: Get timezone name/ID for current system

utlx-isAfter.description: Check if date is after another date

utlx-isBefore.description: Check if date is before another date

utlx-isBetween.description: Check if date is between two dates (inclusive)

utlx-isSameDay.description: Check if dates are same day

utlx-isWeekend.description: Check if date is weekend (Saturday or Sunday)

utlx-parseDate.description: Parse date from string with optional format

utlx-toDate.description: Convert string to date (alias for parseDate, simpler for single argument)

utlx-toUTC.description: Get UTC datetime from local datetime and timezone

utlx-validateDate.description: Validate date string (ISO 8601 format or custom pattern)

utlx-getType.description: Returns the type of a value as a string

utlx-isDate.description: Check if value is a date (date-only, no time)

utlx-isDateTime.description: Check if value is a datetime (with timezone)

utlx-isLocalDateTime.description: Check if value is a local datetime (no timezone)

utlx-isTime.description: Check if value is a time (time-only, no date)

utlx-numberOrDefault.description: Safely convert to number with default

utlx-parseBoolean.description: Parse boolean from string or number

utlx-parseDouble.description: Parse double from string (alias for parseNumber)

utlx-parseNumber.description: This is the PRIMARY function for converting XML/CSV string values to numbers

utlx-stringOrDefault.description: Safely convert to string with default

utlx-toBoolean.description: Convert value to boolean (stricter than parseBoolean)

utlx-toNumber.description: Convert value to number (alias for parseNumber, stricter)

utlx-toObject.description: Try to convert value to object

utlx-typeOf.description: Returns the type of a value as a string (UTL-X camelCase naming convention)

utlx-typeof.description: Returns the type of a value as a string (JavaScript/TypeScript compatibility)

utlx-all.description: Check if all values in array are true

utlx-any.description: Check if any value in array is true

utlx-compactCSV.description: Compacts a CSV string (removes extra whitespace)

utlx-compactJSON.description: Compacts a JSON string (removes all unnecessary whitespace)

utlx-compactXML.description: Compacts an XML string (removes unnecessary whitespace)

utlx-containsKey.description: Checks if an object contains a specific key

utlx-containsValue.description: Checks if an object contains a specific value

utlx-debugPrint.description: Creates a human-readable debug representation of UDM

utlx-debugPrintCompact.description: Creates a compact single-line debug representation

utlx-divideBy.description: Divides an object into sub-objects containing n key-value pairs each.

utlx-everyEntry.description: The predicate function receives two arguments: key and value.

utlx-filterEntries.description: Filters an object to include only entries that satisfy the predicate.

utlx-fromEntries.description: Create object from array of [key, value] pairs (inverse of entries)

utlx-hasKey.description: Checks if an object contains a specific key (Common object method name)

utlx-invert.description: Invert object - swap keys and values

utlx-mapEntries.description: Transforms each entry in the object using a mapping function.

utlx-mapKeys.description: Transforms an object's keys using a mapping function.

utlx-mapValues.description: Transforms an object's values using a mapping function.

utlx-none.description: Check if no values in array are true (all false)

utlx-parseCsv.description: Parse a CSV string into a UDM array

utlx-parseJson.description: Parse a JSON string into a UDM object

utlx-parseQueryString.description: Parse query string from string (public wrapper)

utlx-parseXml.description: Parse an XML string into a UDM object

utlx-parseYaml.description: Parse a YAML string into a UDM object

utlx-prettyPrintCSV.description: Formats a CSV string with aligned columns

utlx-prettyPrintFormat.description: Pretty-prints a UDM object in the specified format

utlx-prettyPrintJSON.description: Pretty-prints a JSON string with optional indentation

utlx-prettyPrintXML.description: Pretty-prints an XML string with optional formatting options

utlx-prettyPrintYAML.description: Pretty-prints a YAML string with optional formatting options

utlx-reduceEntries.description: Reduces all entries in an object to a single value.

utlx-renderCsv.description: Render a UDM array as a CSV string

utlx-renderJson.description: Render a UDM object as a JSON string

utlx-renderXml.description: Render a UDM object as an XML string

utlx-renderYaml.description: Render a UDM object as a YAML string

utlx-someEntry.description: The predicate function receives two arguments: key and value.

utlx-udmToJSON.description: Pretty-prints a UDM object as JSON

utlx-udmToXML.description: Pretty-prints a UDM object as XML

utlx-udmToYAML.description: Pretty-prints a UDM object as YAML

utlx-mapTree.description: Recursively transforms all values in a nested structure (objects and arrays) by applying a transformer function.

utlx-encryptAES256.description: Encrypts data using AES-256-CBC (requires key length of 32 bytes)

utlx-generateIV.description: Generates a random initialization vector (IV) for encryption

utlx-hmacBase64.description: Computes HMAC and returns as base64

utlx-md5.description: Calculate MD5 hash of a string

utlx-sha256.description: Calculate SHA-256 hash of a string

utlx-sha512.description: Calculate SHA-512 hash of a string

utlx-urlDecodeComponent.description: URL decode component (RFC 3986) - decodes %20 as spaces

utlx-urlEncodeComponent.description: URL encode component (RFC 3986) - encodes spaces as %20 for URI paths

utlx-addBOM.description: Add BOM to data for specified encoding

utlx-attributes.description: Get all attributes from XML element as object

utlx-c14n.description: Canonicalizes XML using Canonical XML 1.0 (without comments)

utlx-c14n11.description: Canonicalizes XML using Canonical XML 1.1 (without comments)

utlx-c14n11WithComments.description: Canonicalizes XML using Canonical XML 1.1 (with comments)

utlx-c14nEquals.description: Compares two XML documents for canonical equivalence

utlx-c14nFingerprint.description: Creates a normalized fingerprint of XML for deduplication

utlx-c14nHash.description: Canonicalizes XML and computes its hash

utlx-c14nPhysical.description: Canonicalizes XML using Physical Canonical XML

utlx-c14nSubset.description: Canonicalizes a subset of XML selected by XPath

utlx-c14nWithComments.description: Canonicalizes XML using Canonical XML 1.0 (with comments)

utlx-convertXMLEncoding.description: Convert XML from one encoding to another

utlx-createCDATA.description: Creates a CDATA section with the given content

utlx-createQName.description: Create QName string from local name and namespace URI

utlx-createSOAPEnvelope.description: Creates SOAP envelope with proper namespace prefixes

utlx-detectBOM.description: Detect BOM type from binary data

utlx-detectXMLEncoding.description: Detect encoding from XML declaration or BOM

utlx-enforceNamespacePrefixes.description: Enforces specific namespace prefixes on an XML string

utlx-escapeXML.description: Escapes text for XML without using CDATA

utlx-excC14n.description: Canonicalizes XML using Exclusive Canonical XML (without comments)

utlx-excC14nWithComments.description: Canonicalizes XML using Exclusive Canonical XML (with comments)

utlx-extractCDATA.description: Extracts content from a CDATA section

utlx-formatEmptyElements.description: Formats empty elements according to specified style

utlx-getNamespaces.description: Get all namespace declarations from element

utlx-hasBOM.description: Check if data starts with BOM

utlx-hasContent.description: Check if XML element has any content (child elements or text)

utlx-isCDATA.description: Checks if a string is a CDATA section

utlx-isEmptyElement.description: Check if element is empty (no children, no text)

utlx-localName.description: Get local name (without namespace prefix) from XML element

utlx-namespacePrefix.description: Get namespace prefix from XML element

utlx-namespaceUri.description: Get namespace URI from XML element

utlx-nodeType.description: Get node type (element, attribute, text, etc.)

utlx-normalizeBOM.description: Convert to target encoding with BOM handling

utlx-normalizeXMLEncoding.description: Auto-detect and convert to target encoding

utlx-qualifiedName.description: Get qualified name (with prefix) from XML element

utlx-resolveQName.description: Resolve QName string to full qualified name with namespace

utlx-shouldUseCDATA.description: Determines if content should be wrapped in CDATA

utlx-textContent.description: Get text content from XML element (all text nodes concatenated)

utlx-unwrapCDATA.description: Unwraps CDATA if present, otherwise returns original

utlx-validateDigest.description: Validates that XML digest matches expected value

utlx-validateEncoding.description: Check if encoding name is valid

utlx-wrapIfNeeded.description: Automatically wraps content in CDATA if beneficial

utlx-decodeJWS.description: Decodes a JWS token WITHOUT verifying the signature

utlx-decodeJWT.description: Decodes a JWT token WITHOUT verification

utlx-getJWSAlgorithm.description: Gets the algorithm from a JWS token header

utlx-getJWSHeader.description: Extracts the header from a JWS token

utlx-getJWSInfo.description: Gets information about the JWS token structure

utlx-getJWSKeyId.description: Gets the Key ID (kid) from a JWS token header

utlx-getJWSPayload.description: Extracts the payload from a JWS token WITHOUT verification

utlx-getJWSSigningInput.description: Extracts the signing input from a JWS token

utlx-getJWSTokenType.description: Gets the token type from a JWS token header

utlx-getJWTAudience.description: Gets the audience (aud) claim from JWT

utlx-getJWTClaim.description: Gets a specific claim from JWT

utlx-getJWTClaims.description: Extracts claims from JWT payload WITHOUT verification

utlx-getJWTIssuer.description: Gets the issuer (iss) claim from JWT

utlx-getJWTSubject.description: Gets the subject (sub) claim from JWT

utlx-isJWSFormat.description: Checks if a string is in valid JWS format

utlx-isJWTExpired.description: Checks if JWT is expired based on 'exp' claim

utlx-canonicalJSONHash.description: Canonicalizes JSON and computes cryptographic hash

utlx-canonicalJSONSize.description: Gets the canonical form size in bytes (UTF-8)

utlx-canonicalizeJSON.description: Canonicalizes JSON according to RFC 8785 (JSON Canonicalization Scheme)

utlx-isCanonicalJSON.description: Validates that a string is valid canonical JSON per RFC 8785

utlx-jsonEquals.description: Compares two JSON values for semantic equality using canonicalization

utlx-bitwiseAnd.description: Performs bitwise AND operation on two binaries

utlx-bitwiseOr.description: Performs bitwise OR operation on two binaries

utlx-bitwiseXor.description: Performs bitwise XOR operation on two binaries

utlx-isGzipped.description: Check if data is gzip compressed

utlx-isJarFile.description: Check if data is a JAR file

utlx-isZipArchive.description: Check if data is a zip archive

utlx-listJarEntries.description: List all entries in a JAR file

utlx-listZipEntries.description: List all entries in a zip archive

utlx-readJarEntry.description: Read a single entry from a JAR file

utlx-readZipEntry.description: Read a single entry from a zip archive

utlx-shiftLeft.description: Shifts bits left by specified positions

utlx-shiftRight.description: Shifts bits right by specified positions

utlx-unzipArchive.description: Extract all files from a zip archive

utlx-zipArchive.description: Create a zip archive from multiple files

utlx-canCoerce.description: Check if value can be coerced to type

utlx-coerce.description: Coerce value to target type with default

utlx-coerceAll.description: Coerce all values in array to target type

utlx-generateUuidV7Batch.description: Generate batch of UUID v7s with monotonic guarantee

utlx-measure.description: Measure execution time of expression (would need runtime support)

utlx-smartCoerce.description: Smart coercion - infers target type from context

utlx-timerCheck.description: Get elapsed time without stopping timer

utlx-timerStop.description: Stop a named timer and get elapsed time

utlx-treeFind.description: Find node by path in tree

utlx-treeFlatten.description: Flatten tree to array of leaf nodes

utlx-treeMap.description: Map over all nodes in a tree structure

utlx-tryCoerce.description: Try to coerce, return null on failure

utlx-addTax.description: Calculates the total amount including tax.

utlx-calculateDiscount.description: Calculates the price after applying a discount.

utlx-calculateTax.description: Calculates tax amount for a given amount and rate.

utlx-formatCurrency.description: Formats a number as currency with locale-specific formatting.

utlx-futureValue.description: Calculates the future value of a present amount.

utlx-getCurrencyDecimals.description: Gets the number of decimal places for a currency.

utlx-isValidAmount.description: Validates if an amount is within acceptable range.

utlx-isValidCurrency.description: Validates if a currency code is valid (ISO 4217).

utlx-parseCurrency.description: Parses a currency string to a number.

utlx-percentageChange.description: Calculates the percentage change between two values.

utlx-presentValue.description: Calculates the present value of a future amount.

utlx-removeTax.description: Calculates the original amount from a total that includes tax.

utlx-roundToCents.description: Rounds up to the nearest cent (2 decimal places).

utlx-roundToDecimalPlaces.description: Rounds a number to a specified number of decimal places using banker's rounding.

utlx-bearing.description: Calculates the initial bearing (forward azimuth) from point1 to point2.

utlx-boundingBox.description: Calculates the bounding box (min/max lat/lon) for an array of coordinates.

utlx-destinationPoint.description: Calculates a destination point given a starting point, bearing, and distance.

utlx-distance.description: Calculates the distance between two geographic coordinates using the Haversine formula.

utlx-isPointInCircle.description: Checks if a point is within a circular radius from a center point.

utlx-isPointInPolygon.description: Checks if a point is inside a polygon using the ray casting algorithm.

utlx-midpoint.description: Calculates the midpoint between two coordinates.

utlx-csvAddColumn.description: Add a new column to CSV with computed values

utlx-csvColumn.description: Get a specific column as array

utlx-csvColumns.description: Get all column names/headers from CSV data

utlx-csvFilter.description: Filter CSV rows based on column value

utlx-csvRow.description: Get a specific row by index

utlx-csvRows.description: Get all rows from CSV data

utlx-csvSummarize.description: Calculate summary statistics for CSV columns

utlx-yamlEntries.description: Get entries (key-value pairs) from a YAML object

utlx-yamlExists.description: Check if path exists in YAML

utlx-yamlFilterByKeyPattern.description: Filter YAML object by key pattern

utlx-yamlFindByField.description: Find all values in YAML structure by field name

utlx-yamlFindObjectsWithField.description: Find all objects containing specific field

utlx-yamlFromEntries.description: Create YAML object from entries array

utlx-yamlGetDocument.description: Get specific document from multi-document YAML by index

utlx-yamlHasRequiredFields.description: Check if YAML has required fields

utlx-yamlKeys.description: Get all keys from a YAML object

utlx-yamlMergeAll.description: Merge multiple YAML documents in order

utlx-yamlMergeDocuments.description: Merge multiple YAML documents into single multi-document string

utlx-yamlOmitKeys.description: Omit specific keys from YAML object

utlx-yamlSelectKeys.description: Select specific keys from YAML object

utlx-yamlSplitDocuments.description: Split multi-document YAML into array of documents

utlx-yamlValidateKeyPattern.description: Validate all keys match a pattern

utlx-yamlValues.description: Get all values from a YAML object
